name: Brown Sugar Refrigerator Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat together the butter, sugar, egg, vanilla, and orange rind.
2. Combine the flour, salt, and baking powder; sift into the first mixture and mix well.
3. Chill the dough.
4. Shape the dough into a roll about 2-1/2 inches in diameter.
5. Wrap the roll in waxed paper or foil.
6. Store the roll in the refrigerator or freezer.
7. To bake, unwrap the roll and cut into 1/8 inch slices.
8. Lay the slices on a greased cookie sheet.
9. Use floured cookie cutters to cut the slices into fancy shapes.
10. Gather up any scraps of dough, press together, and chill again.
11. Bake the cookies at 400 degrees for 6 to 8 minutes.
12. Makes 4 to 5 dozen crisp, "butterscotchy" cookies.
